title: EQ - Button to change preset is present
scenario: EQ tab in Device Settings displays preset buttons (Bass, Flat, Bright, Custom EQ) with Bass set as default on supported devices
steps: Tap on a supported connected device to open Device Settings
Observe the preset buttons displayed below the headline
expected: The EQ tab in Device Settings displays preset buttons (Bass, Flat, Bright, Custom EQ) below the headline, with Bass set as the default preset.
